actionUnits.condition: Automatic neighbor-driven ignition. MonoBehaviour_0 (script guid 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d, Fire) has isOn=false, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, onNeighborsThreshold=2, maxNeighborDistance=4, downMultiplier=2. Awake randomizes timeToOn in [40,60]. Update will set shouldTurnOn when onNeighbors >= 2 (via NotifyNeighborState/FindNeighbors from external controller). Expect UpdateFireState(true) to Play particles and notify neighbors when isOn flips to true within ~40-60s.

Automatic water-driven extinguish. Fire implements IWaterInteractable.WaterHit(Vector3). With maxHitInterval=2 and totalHitTime=5, repeated WaterHit hits (interval < 2s) should accumulate currentHitTime until >=5 to turn fire off in Update, then UpdateFireState(true) should Stop particles and notify neighbors. Requires an external water system to call WaterHit each <2s; BoxCollider present for physical interaction.
